ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the event (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event is held */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees for the event */,
  "registration_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration for the event is open or closed */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link for users to register for the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Instructor's area of expertise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_instructors" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was assigned to the event */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, instructor, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the attendee (e.g., attending, not attending) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user registered for the event */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user checked in for the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the event (e.g., on a scale of 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the event */,
  "feedback_count" INTEGER /* Number of feedback for the event */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the event */,
  "feedback_positive_count" INTEGER /* Number of positive feedbacks */,
  "feedback_negative_count" INTEGER /* Number of negative feedbacks */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
